item.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency: One Ideal Signing for All 32 Teams
item.description: Who should every team sign in NFL free agency? We try to find the best fit for each.

item.title: Elimination of April Transfer Window Causing Return of Spring Football Games?
item.description: The disappearance of the spring transfer portal window offers the opportunity for a reappearance of spring football games across the country.

item.title: Cleetus McFarland Surprised Kevin Harvick With His Next Move in NASCAR
item.description: Cleetus McFarland is taking the next step in his NASCAR career, he explained to Kevin Harvick on "SPEED."

item.title: 2026 NFL Mock Draft: David Bailey Goes After Mendoza; Jeremiyah Love Goes Fourth
item.description: Geoff Schwartz is here with his first mock for the 2026 NFL Draft. Here's where he projects QBs Fernando Mendoza and Ty Simpson will land.

item.title: 2026 World Baseball Classic News: Jeremy Peña's Status Unclear Amid Injury
item.description: The latest news, announcements and updates ahead of the 2026 World Baseball Classic.
